title: Desmopressin
buzzwords: synthetic ADH analogue with selective receptor action
concentrates urine without raising blood pressure
triggers endothelial von Willebrand factor release

title: Vasopressin
buzzwords: potent arteriolar vasoconstrictor raising blood pressure
stops bleeding esophageal varices via splanchnic constriction
causes mesenteric ischemia and skin necrosis
strong V1 receptor activity, not used for DI
